name: 7-day-nextjs-web-design
description: A seven-day design workflow for web products that will be built in Next.js.

interface.longDescription: Guides web product design from brief through developer handoff with explicit route, layout, rendering, metadata, and component planning for Next.js applications.
defaultPrompt: Plan this product as a seven-day Next.js design sprint.
Turn this feature into a Next.js-aware design handoff.
Map the routes, layouts, and key screens for this app.
